input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36/reviews" --jq '.[].id' | while read id; do echo "=== Review $id ===" && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36/reviews/$id/comments" --jq '.[] | {user: .user.login, path: .path, line: .line, body: .body}'; done

REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36" --jq '{title: .title, body: .body, state: .state, user: .user.login, requested_reviewers: [.requested_reviewers[].login]}'

content.content:
{"body":"## Summary
- Add `GetRequest`, `DeleteRequest`, and `RetryRequest` to the Overseerr client with a new `delete()` HTTP helper
- Wire up three new agent tools: `get_request_detail`, `delete_request` (destructive), `retry_request` (destructive)
- Enrich the `Request` type with `UpdatedAt`, `Seasons`, and additional `MediaInfo` fields for the detail view
- Add httptest-based tests for all three new client methods

## Test plan
- [x] `go build ./...` passes
- [x] `go test ./...` passes (including new tests for GetRequest, DeleteRequest, RetryRequest)
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean

Run: 20260403-1806-d904","requested_reviewers":[],"state":"open","title":"feat: add Overseerr request detail, deletion, and retry","user":"patflynn"}
